name: Let All That You Do Be Done in Love Left Tee
description: Carry a quiet yet powerful reminder of your faith with the “Let All That You Do Be Done in Love” Left Tee, inspired by 1 Corinthians 16:14. With its subtle left-chest design, this piece reflects a life rooted in Christ—where every action is guided by love, grace, and compassion. Perfect for everyday wear, it encourages you to live out your faith in simple but meaningful ways.
